title: Shyarly Sees Disaster
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Nami, Fish-Men, Luffy. The core story beat is shyarly sees disaster.
scene: The scene centers on shyarly sees disaster, with Unknown person #1, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Nami, Fish-Men, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji- Chin!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Sanjiii!! Are you awake?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember between

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...where... am I...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank goodness...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: you're in the house of some friends of mine, in the port town.....!! Sanji-chin, you lost almost all the blood in your body!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm so relieved we managed to find a blood donor in time...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I... lost all my blood...?! what... happened to me...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keep still, you still need rest.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Why wouldn't any of the fishmen donate at all...? We ran all through town, but there were no humans in sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought you weren't gonna make it for a moment there....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys... did that for me...?!! thanks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh... Why can't I remember...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did this happen...? What was I doing...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaahH!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you lose any more blood, you might really die...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, Sanji! These are the donors we finally managed to find at a local bar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, no need to thank us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's only natural to help a fellow human in need!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm...?!! don't tell me I received blood from a fragile lady...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: think nothing of it, silly! ♤

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: pirate twins splash and splatter

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can have more if you'd like! ♤

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy! Could I take a look at your right arm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Try saying "Thank you"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Toxin check's positive! I knew it... there's poison in that wound!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now you mention it, I did feel a nasty sensation when I was fighting those fishermen...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! are you all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this poison is deadly...!! and yet... Luffy's body seems to have antibodies against it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's driving the poison away already...!! This is incredible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you been affected by a poison like this before?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, well... there was that time in Impel down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...when I almost died from being poisoned! Ahahahah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not something to laugh about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It must've been that guy...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The swordsman Guy with the tentacle legs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He managed to withstand my attack, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He must be pretty strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaAah!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Now then... what next? With these guys like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And what's worse...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: TCH... Those idiot girls, always causing a racket...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I accidentally managed to poison that straw hat kid... I'm not gonna be popular if he dies...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Assassin of the new fishman pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that scream... it was IsHley and the others, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I did hear them around here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IsHLEY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They were talking about whether or not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...they should open a barrel...

summary: Shyarly Sees Disaster. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
